layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for section paddings. Asymmetry where appropriate.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento style for features. Control room style for product grids (dense, exact alignments).
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl for images and cards.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase on cards.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-transform duration-300 ease-out.

component_guidelines.navbar: Glassmorphism with backdrop-blur-xl and semi-transparent dark blue background. Sticky top.
component_guidelines.hero: Dark overlay (max bg-black/50) over abstract dark blue background image. Large Outfit heading.
component_guidelines.buttons: Primary: Solid white with dark text. Secondary: Outline with white border.
component_guidelines.product_cards: Flat solid surfaces or subtle 1px border grid. Image should be prominent.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark blue background for hero section

special_offers.description: Luxury dark gift box for special offers banner

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Do not use generic fonts. Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
2. Follow the Jewel & Luxury archetype. Backgrounds should be deep dark blue (slate-950 or custom #020617).
3. Implement responsive grids for Categories, Trending Products, and Reviews.
5. Ensure strict contrast adherence (white text on dark backgrounds).
6. MUST include 'data-testid' on all buttons, links, and form inputs.
7. Never use placeholder images. Use the provided media_urls strictly.
